In multiple end-of-quarter frames, OCR reads the scoreboard team labels as "BRISTOL CENT." and "E. CATHOLIC," with the numbers "52" next to Bristol Central and "40" next to East Catholic.
Because the clock reaches 0:00.0 while still showing the same 3rd-quarter scoreboard, the end-of-third-quarter score is 52 to 40, with Bristol Central leading.

Among the answer choices, this matches the option stating 52 to 52 tied only in the first number but not the second, and it does not match any 55-40 or 64-32 option. The only supported score from OCR is 52-40 with Bristol Central ahead, which is not listed exactly among the choices.
